title: How to Automate Content Creation With AI in 2026 (AI Content Repurposing)
summary: Trupeer AI automates content creation from screen recordings, generating multiple assets including polished videos, documentation, and translations in minutes. The platform includes a Chrome extension, custom AI avatar creation, voice cloning, and one-click translation features.
writeup: This video demonstrates Trupeer AI, a platform that turns screen recordings into multiple finished assets including polished videos, documentation, and translations within minutes. It covers the platform's core features: a Chrome extension for capture, custom AI avatar creation, voice cloning, and one-click translation. The relevance lies in repurposing a single recording into several content formats through workflow automation, reducing manual editing and localization work.
